subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Fwefwenya tuthachijilo tukwavo twa Litilicha yakuhanjika.
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanalumbununa, vanatombola, vanahandununa nakutanjika vyuma
vyatwama mu Litilicha yakuhanjika. Kumakumishilo, valongi vanambulula cheka tuthachikijilo
